title: IDX welcomes 3 new issuers, Aguan’s included
body: These three companies are engaged in the healthcare and property segment, one of which belongs to the property mogul Aguan.

title: Foreign investors are still selling shares; 469 million shares have been sold
body: The total number of shares traded by foreign investors hit 3 billion. Sales volume was higher at 3.57 billion shares, but foreign purchase volume was 3.10 billion shares.

title: ANTM's gold exploration costs reach IDR 271 billion as of December 2024
body: Gold exploration was conducted in Pongkor, West Java, involving drilling activities including in-mine drilling (underground) and deep drilling (surface).

title: BRMS tops Net Foreign Buy at week’s end
body: PT Bumi Resources Minerals Tbk (BRMS) rose to the top spot for net foreign buy at the closing bell of stock trading at the end of the week (10/1).

title: Bank Indonesia Survey: Inflation pressure rises in February 2025
body: BI's Retail Sales Survey projects inflation to rise in IEH for February 2025, ahead of Ramadan and Eid al-Fitr

body: These three companies are engaged in the healthcare and property segment, one of which belongs to the property mogul Aguan.

body: Gold exploration was conducted in Pongkor, West Java, involving drilling activities including in-mine drilling (underground) and deep drilling (surface).

title: BRMS tops Net Foreign Buy at week’s end
body: PT Bumi Resources Minerals Tbk (BRMS) rose to the top spot for net foreign buy at the closing bell of stock trading at the end of the week (10/1).

body: BI's Retail Sales Survey projects inflation to rise in IEH for February 2025, ahead of Ramadan and Eid al-Fitr

title: Episenta Utama acquires 26 million shares in Nusantara Pelabuhan Handal (PORT)
body: This investor increased their ownership to 24.15% by purchasing these shares through PT Trimegah Sekuritas Indonesia Tbk.

title: BYAN explores three mining areas in Q4
body: Three BYAN's subsidiaries carried out mining exploration activities in three areas in the fourth quarter of 2024.

title: Teguk closes down over 100 outlets a year post-IPO; what gives?
body: Decline in people's purchasing power dragged TGUK's performance down, forcing the company to close down over 100 stores.

title: CUAN added to UMA list again, here’s the company’s response
body: CUAN was also included in the UMA list on May 2, 2024. In 2023, CUAN also frequently faced trading suspensions on the IDX.

title: Official, CSIS is greenlit for rights issue of 3.92 billion shares
body: CSIS, the manufacturer of household product brand Olympic, will conduct a rights issue of 3.9 billion shares.

title: Indonesia partners with Qatari investors for 1 million affordable housing program
body: Qilaa Internasional Group has signed an MoU with the government regarding this program.

title: INPP transfers 36.7% subsidiary’s shares to Hankyu Hanshin
body: INPP divests 36.7% of NAP to Hankyu Hanshin, Japan, for IDR 652.65 billion.

title: BSI's SBSN transactions surge by 65.38%
body: The company distributed five SBSN series, namely SR020, ST012, SWR005, SR021, and ST013.

title: CASH’s shareholders name ex-banker to be President Director
body: The new president director is said to have quite an extensive experience in the financial industry.

title: JCI corrected 0.22%, foreign investors recorded net buy
body: Foreign investors started to record net buy in the capital market, after several days of consistent net sell.

title: Foreign investors continue to sell billions of GOTO shares; net sell recorded 456 million shares
body: Foreign investor stock transactions ended Thursday, January 9, with a net sell of 456 million shares. Foreigners purchased almost 2.64 billion shares, while over 3.10 billion shares were sold.

title: BUMI and BRMS lead top Net Buy list
body: BUMI and BRMS secured the top positions in net foreign buy transactions during stock trading on Thursday (9/1).

title: BNI supports Indonesian migrant workers with KUR
body: As of the end of 2024, BNI had disbursed KUR loans totalling IDR 900 billion to more than 48,000 lenders.

title: Raharja Cepu to ready USD 6.90 million on call for Petrogas Jatim
body: Raharja Energi Cepu readies cash-on-call for Cepu Bloc in East Java through its subsidiary, PT Petrogas Jatim Utama Cendana.

title: The controller continues to increase its stake in Surya Citra Media (SCMA)
body: By purchasing 36.22 million SCMA shares through PT Mirae Asset Sekuritas Indonesia, PT Elang Mahkota Teknologi Tbk now formally owns 62.07% of the company.

title: Recently listed, HGII eyes IDR 95 billion profit in 2025
body: Hero Global Investment seeks revenue of IDR 545.8 billion in 2025, with net profit projected to reach IDR 95 billion.

title: Indonesia’s foreign reserves rise 3.66% to USD 155.7 billion
body: Bank Indonesia (BI) noted that foreign exchange reserves rose in December 2024 compared to November 2024.

title: Raja Roti Cemerlang to begin exports to Australia
body: “We have an immediate export opportunity to Australia, specifically to Perth, where we have a partner.”

title: Warrants as bonus, BRRC boosted 18.1% in morning debut
body: In conjunction with its stock listing, BRRC also issued up to 145.75 million Series I Warrants alongside its new shares.

title: Debuting, HGII saw 22% jump in morning session
body: PT Hero Global Investment Tbk (HGII), a renewable energy issuer, officially debuted on the Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) on Thursday (9/1).

title: Yulisar Khiat increases stake in HEAL
body: Yulisar Khiat, a member of the Board of Directors at PT Medikaloka Hermina Tbk (HEAL), has increased his shareholding in a transaction earlier this year (2/1).

title: BATA’s USD 4.8 million debt forgiven: Who played a key role?
body: BATA has been struggling with consecutive losses since 2022.

title: A year debuting, NICE saw 18.72% corrections
body: PT Adhi Kartiko Pratama Tbk (NICE) shifted 2.25% upward to IDR 364 from IDR 356 at the beginning of today’s (9/1) trading session.

title: ITMA pairs up with BIPI to establish 4 new subsidiaries
body: These subsidiaries are set up to handle the company's business in freight transportation via waterways, as well as leasing activities.

title: Renovating Bali hotel, SSIA secures IDR 1.4 trillion facility from BCA
body: "There will be no operating income from Melia Bali Hotels & Resorts in 2025 due to the ongoing renovation."

title: Price surge, IDX authorities put CUAN and INDX on watch list
body: CUAN and INDX are listed under UMA following sudden and atypical price jump in stock prices.

title: JCI at the red zone, foreign investors continue offloading
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) closed 0.04% or 2.93 points weaker at 7,080.35 last Wednesday (8/1) after gaining a slight jump to 7,083.28 on the day before.

title: Habco Trans Maritima forms joint venture with Hong Kong investor
body: HATM ventured into the ship management business, with IDR5.1 billion investment.

title: Another net sell of 1.16 billion shares resulted from foreign transactions
body: PT Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) registered the greatest net sell at 527.19 million shares after foreign investors sold 1.83 billion GOTO shares.

title: Bukit Asam reports Q4 2024 mining exploration activities
body: The exploration was conducted in the Tanjung Enim area using coring, open hole, and geophysical logging methods.
